title: Close Low Angle Guofeng Travel Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Close Low Angle Guofeng Travel Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 realistic guofeng travel portrait for soft spring guofeng flower-wall portrait, built around an intimate low-angle smartphone perspective. Subject: adult East Asian woman with natural delicate features, loose half-up hair, small floral hair ornaments, and gentle sweet smile wears soft ivory guofeng dress with embroidered sheer sleeves, light shawl, small floral hair ornament, and real fabric folds, leans slightly toward the camera with realistic skin texture, clear shoulder/neck line, natural loose updo or half-up hair, delicate hair ornaments, and gentle romantic expression. Scene: heritage flower wall with vines, blossoms, lanterns, wooden windows, white walls, and grey-tile details provides a real guofeng travel environment with vines, flowers, lanterns, tea ware, wood windows, old street stalls, jewelry hangers, corridor details, white walls, grey tiles, and soft blur. Composition: Fixed close smartphone view from below the chest, slight low angle, upper body leaning toward camera, near foreground hands and fabric, natural perspective depth, and intimate interactive portrait framing. Signature Elements: Pose, gesture, or foreground action: thigh-up near-camera interactive portrait with direct gentle gaze, shy smile, and approachable romantic posture. Preserved close low angle guofeng travel portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-definition realistic guofeng travel photography, fresh translucent light, natural adult beauty, real fabric folds, floral embroidery, soft background blur, and polished social portrait finish. Color Palette: Fixed soft guofeng palette led by the wardrobe color, natural floral tones, warm wood, lantern accents, white wall/grey tile neutrals, and gentle skin tones. Lighting: Natural soft light with clear face readability, delicate fabric highlights, gentle hair-ornament glints, and fresh airy background depth. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
